string 2:
Oh, hey, I need your help! The fog is so bad, I can't get
any deeper into the forest.
{next}Have you asked Cherrymon to help?
{next}Guess you'd better give up, then.
{next}Just follow your sixth sense!
I asked, but... he wouldn't give me the time of day!

I was set on exploring this forest today. If I put something
on my schedule, I do it!

Just get out there and wing it? All I can see coming of that
is me getting lost.

Cherrymon won't listen to me, so can you try talking to him
instead?

I wonder what's got his leaves in a rustle... Sorry for the
trouble, but thanks in advance!
...Hm? Did you need something?
{next}Could you get rid of the fog?
No.
{next}Can't you make an exception?
I said no!
{next}You wanna get attacked again?
N-No, I do not... But "no" means "no"!
I am sorry, but you need to give up.

Wh-What in the world are you doing?! I told you! It is not
possible!
Now, now. What's going on, here?

But you told me to allow no one through, so I simply
thickened the fog to bar all entry.

But didn't I say that these people are my guests and should
be allowed passage?

Ah, yes... I do believe I recognize them now. With the fog
so thick, I could not see...
O-Oh, dear... It's as I feared!
{next}What was that tremor?
{next}What did you do?
{next}Glad the doubts have been dispelled.

Something's happened in the Deep Woods. I must go there at
once!
I did nothing! Don't confuse me with a certain drunkard.

I'd love to do the same for the fog, but sadly, I can't just
yet.

I sensed an odd presence in the sanctuary and was checking
to see if we had an intruder.

That could be dangerous, so I asked Cherrymon to raise the
fog and keep the residents out.

That presence... I'm certain someone's here. How timely your
visit! Please come with me!
Someone's here!
Ungh... Bzz...
Who are you?
The Current... The Curreeeeent...!
*gasp* Could this be...?
{next}Someone affected by the sanctuary's power?
{next}A Titan?
{next}A fan of yours?

Quite the astute assessment of the situation. I must admit
I'm a little surprised.
No, this is no Titan. It merely seems to have lost its mind.
D-Do not be ridiculous! I have no fans!

It was simply driven mad by the powerful energies of the
Current in this place.

There's no talking it down in this state. So we'll just have
to beat some sense into it!
Bzz... Wh-What wazz I doing...?
Ah, what a relief! It seems you've come back to your senses.
{next}So, what exactly happened here?
{next}Well, let's head back.
{next}The Curreeeeent...!

The energy of the Current here is incredible. Any Digimon
would find it overwhelming.

Well! It's like this meant nothing to you. Aren't you
curious to learn what happened?

N-Not you, too?! If need be, I can crack you on the head to
bring you back to normal...

I was performing a ritual to safeguard this place and keep
its energies in check.

I'll restart the ritual. That should prevent any more
Digimon from losing their minds.

Thanks to you, we got the situation resolved before it got
out of hand. Here's a reward!

I'll make sure to tell Cherrymon to clear the fog whenever
you visit now.
Come by any time you want to hear this song!
